form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a one length second at Q Straight but did record a speedy 18.87 over the 350m journey. Looms as the one to beat this time.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd in a Grade 4/5 on March 31 over 457m at this track behind Big Al's beaten 6 lengths (25.53). Boasts a course and distance PB in a scintillating 25.03. Top chance.
